name: Livelong Healthy & Strong Duck & Sweet Potato Recipe Wet Dog Food, 12.8-oz can, case of 12
description: Quack up your sidekick with a with a meal that’s just ducky when you serve Livelong Healthy & Strong Duck & Sweet Potato Recipe Wet Dog Food. This natural food for dogs is made with duck as the number one ingredient. It is paw-fect for all breeds of dogs in any stage of life and does not contain any grains, gluten, artificial flavors or preservatives. This wet dog food is 90% meat and crafted in a pate-style with delicious organic veggies. It’s proudly made in the USA and packaged in a case of 12 convenient 12.8-ounce cans for nourishing your canine companion.
